title: RSW Christmas Pet Dog 14" Cracker – Fun Festive Dog Toy Cracker with Cute Puppy Design – Includes Knotted Rope Toy – Ideal for Dogs and Pet Owners
features: FESTIVE DOG CRACKER – 14-inch Christmas cracker featuring a fun red design with paw prints, snowflakes, and a cute puppy illustration
DOG-FRIENDLY CONTENTS – Includes a knotted rope toy for chewing, playing fetch, or tug-of-war – perfect for keeping pets entertained
SAFE FOR PETS – No loud noises or harmful contents, making it suitable for nervous dogs and stress-free festive fun
DECORATIVE PACKAGING – Presented in a printed board box with an acetate window, ideal for display or gifting to pet owners
PERFECT STOCKING FILLER – A great way to include your four-legged friend in the Christmas celebrations and create lasting memories
description: Make your furry friend part of the festive celebrations with this adorable RSW Christmas Pet Dog 14" Cracker. Perfect for dogs and dog lovers, this cracker is designed to add some extra cheer to your Christmas festivities while keeping your pet entertained. Featuring a bright red design with paw prints, snowflakes, and a cute puppy illustration wearing a Santa hat, it looks fantastic as part of your seasonal decorations or on the Christmas table. Inside, you’ll find a durable knotted rope toy – great for chewing, playing fetch, or a fun game of tug-of-war with your dog. The cracker is made from printed board with a clear acetate window, making it a lovely presentation piece and a great way to treat your pet during the holidays. Unlike traditional crackers, this pet-safe version contains no loud noises, ensuring a stress-free experience for your dog. This festive cracker is an ideal way to include pets in family traditions, whether it’s a stocking filler, a Christmas morning treat, or just a fun surprise during the holidays. The packaging can be recycled after use, helping you celebrate sustainably while spoiling your pup with a toy they’ll love. WARNING! DO NOT PULL INNER OUTSIDE PARTY CRACKER. PULL CRACKER AWAY FROM FACE. DO NOT PULL NEAR EYES OR EARS. PULL BOTH ENDS AT ARMS LENGTH FIRMLY AND SHARPLY. DO NOT REMOVE INNER. WARNING! Not suitable for children under 3 years due to small parts which could represent a choking hazard. Contents may include glass and items with functional sharp points or edges. Adult supervision is required. Items may fall from crackers whilst pulling.
